name: First PR
description: Composite skill — land a safe first PR in an unfamiliar repo without rediscovery loops or guessing at conventions. Chains onboard-new-repo (architecture + scripts + CI scan) → context-pack (relevant files + standards + ADRs) → scope-and-execute (narrow the task) → test-driven-development (failing test first) → pr-to-release (open the PR). Use the first time you contribute to a repo.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Primeiro PR
pt-BR.description: Skill composto — entregue um primeiro PR seguro num repo desconhecido sem loops de descoberta nem chutes sobre convenções. Encadeia onboard-new-repo (arquitetura + scripts + scan de CI) → context-pack (arquivos relevantes + standards + ADRs) → scope-and-execute (escopo restrito) → test-driven-development (teste que falha primeiro) → pr-to-release (abre o PR). Use a primeira vez que contribuir num repo.
